creator: kristen.glynn@virginblue.com.au
text:
When trying to run cvsup on 7.0 current (synced sources Sep18) on i386 through a socks server you get the following error..

'runsocks telnet host' also core dumps.

root@VB-KRIS# runsocks cvsup -P m -g -L 2 standard-supfile @M3novm @M3stackdump
18249: NEC NWSL Socks5 v1.0r11  library


***
*** runtime error:
***    Segmentation violation - possible attempt to dereference NIL
***    pc = 0x284d7b39
***
